name: Teenage Rocky Roads Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt almond bark in a double boiler over low heat.
2. Mix the cereals in a large bowl.
3. Pour the melted almond bark over the cereal mixture and combine thoroughly.
4. Add the colored marshmallows and mix again.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper.
6. Allow to cool until firm.
Makes about 3 dozen.
